data.body:
[The Promise at Sunset Digital merch Distribution Notice]

To celebrate the update, we’re giving out digital merch as a gift! 🎁 
Set your background with the stunning looks of Hoshino and Shiroko from another world!

➡️Download Now: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2721320
